card.name: Charitable Patron
card.text: When this creature enters, create a 2/2 white Peasant creature token, a 1/1 blue Bird creature token with flying, and a Clue token. (It's an artifact with "{2}, Sacrifice this artifact: Draw a card.") Creature tokens you control have skulk. (They can't be blocked by creatures with greater power.) Abilities of noncreature tokens you activate cost {1} less to activate.

card.name: Corrupted Gilleon
card.text: Whenever this creature deals combat damage to a player, draw a card, then discard a card. Whenever you draw your second card each turn, each opponent loses 1 life and you create a Treasure token. (It's an artifact with "{T}, Sacrifice this token: Add one mana of any color.")

card.name: Spawn of Cruelty
card.text: At the beginning of your upkeep, this creature deals 1 damage to each player. As long as your life total is less than or equal to half your starting life total, this creature gets +2/+1 and has menace.

card.name: Released Hellraiser
card.text: Whenever you expend 5, put a +1/+1 counter on this creature. (You expend 5 as you spend your fifth total mana to cast spells during a turn.) Whenever you expend 8, this creature deals damage equal to its power to any target.

card.name: Resourceful Officer
card.text: This creature can't be blocked by creatures with power 3 or greater. Whenever one or more creatures you control deal combat damage to a player or planeswalker, draw a card.

card.name: Reformed Mercenary
card.text: Spells you cast that target a creature cost {1} less to cast. Stalwart — Whenever you cast a spell that targets one or more Allies you control, this creature gains deathtouch and lifelink until end of turn.

card.name: Weeping Spring
card.text: This enchantment enters with three charge counters on it. Remove a charge counter from this enchantment: Add one mana of any color. Activate only once each turn. Whenever you expend 5, target player mills four cards. (You expend 5 as you spend your fifth total mana to cast spells during a turn.)

card.name: Catalytic Vial
card.text: When this artifact enters, exile the top card of your library and up to one noncreature card from your graveyard. Until the end of your next turn, you may play those cards. Spells you cast from anywhere other than your hand cost {1} less to cast.

card.name: Friends // Lovers
card.text:
Create two 1/1 white Ally creature tokens.
---
Aftermath (Cast this spell only from your graveyard. Then exile it.) Put a +1/+1 counter on each of up to two target creatures. Those creatures gain first strike, vigilance, lifelink, and haste until end of turn.

card.name: Sower of Sorrows
card.text: Whenever a creature card leaves your graveyard for the first time each turn, create a 0/1 green Plant creature token. Whenever a noncreature card leaves your graveyard for the first time each turn, put a +1/+1 counter on a creature you control.

card.name: Inspired Footman
card.text: Stalwart — Whenever you cast a spell that targets one or more Allies you control, this creature gets +1/+1 until end of turn.

card.name: Hardened Scrounger
card.text: Whenever one or more creatures you control deal combat damage to a player or planeswalker, surveil 1. (Look at the top card of your library. You may put it into your graveyard.)

card.name: Hushing Spirit
card.text: When this creature enters, exile up to one target card from a graveyard. {2}, Sacrifice this creature: Destroy target artifact or enchantment.

card.name: Lone Guardsman
card.text: Lifelink When this creature dies, draw a card.

card.name: Weary Inspiration
card.text: Create three 2/2 white Peasant creature tokens with vigilance. Scry 3.

card.name: Noble Outrider
card.text: Whenever one or more tokens you control enter, put a +1/+1 counter on this creature.

card.name: Bounty Hunter
card.text: Flying Whenever one or more creatures you control deal combat damage to a player or planeswalker, create a Food token. (It's an artifact with "{2}, {T}, Sacrifice this token: You gain 3 life.")

card.name: Provisions Specialist
card.text: As long as you control a token, this creature gets +2/+1. Cache {2} ({2}, Exile this card from your hand: Draw a card. You can cast this later by also discarding a card.)

card.name: Rodent Ruination
card.text: Create a 1/1 white Mouse creature token, then create an additional one of those tokens for each Calamity card in your graveyard.

card.name: Acolyte of Amplification
card.text: Vigilance Whenever you expend 5, this creature gets +3/+0 until end of turn. (You expend 5 as you spend your fifth total mana to cast spells during a turn.)

card.name: Skybound Savior
card.text: Flying Whenever this creature enters, return target creature or enchantment card with mana value 3 or less from your graveyard to your hand. Cache {2} ({2}, Exile this card from your hand: Draw a card. You can cast this later by also discarding a card.)

card.name: Outreach Captain
card.text: When this creature enters, create a 1/1 white Ally creature token. Stalwart — Whenever you cast a spell that targets one or more Allies you control, put a +1/+1 counter on this creature.

card.name: Sinking Prison
card.text: Exile target nonland permanent with X plus 1 doom counters on it, where X is the number of Calamity cards in your graveyard. Its controller may cast it for as long as it remains exiled, and it costs {1} more to cast for each doom counter on it.

card.name: Hand of Conquest
card.text: Enchant creature Enchanted creature can't be blocked as long as it has power 2 or less. Otherwise, it can't attack or block.

card.name: Luminous Rebuke
card.text: This spell costs {3} less to cast if it targets a tapped creature. Destroy target creature.

card.name: Shield Charge
card.text: Prevent all combat damage that would be dealt to target creature or planeswalker this turn. If that permanent is a creature, it gets +2/+2 until end of turn.

card.name: Conviction
card.text: Enchant creature Enchanted creature gets +1/+3. {W}: Return this Aura to its owner's hand.

card.name: Conquer Adversity
card.text: Creatures you control get +1/+1 until end of turn. Flashback {3}{W} (You may cast this card from your graveyard for its flashback cost. Then exile it.)

card.name: Join the Cause
card.text: Enchant creature Enchanted creature gets +2/+2, has first strike, and is an Ally in addition to its other types.

card.name: Curio Inspector
card.text: When this creature enters, create a Clue token. (It's an artifact with "{2}, Sacrifice this artifact: Draw a card.")

card.name: Floodrange Scavengers
card.text: When this creature enters and whenever you expend 5, target player mills three cards. (You expend 5 as you spend your fifth total mana to cast spells during a turn.) {T}: Add {U}. Spend this mana only to cast instant or sorcery spells.

card.name: Rimereader Oracle
card.text: Flying Whenever you cast a spell from anywhere other than your hand, this creature gets +2/+0 until end of turn.

card.name: Privileged Escort
card.text: Whenever a token you control enters, this creature can't be blocked this turn.

card.name: Seaborn Supporter
card.text: Stalwart — Whenever you cast a spell that targets one or more Allies you control, draw a card, then discard a card.

card.name: Forewarning Figure
card.text: Whenever you draw your second card each turn, put a +1/+1 counter on this creature.

card.name: Studious Exemplar
card.text: Flying Whenever you expend 5, put a +1/+1 counter on this creature. (You expend 5 as you spend your fifth total mana to cast spells during a turn.)

card.name: Succumbed Gilleon
card.text: When this creature enters, return up to one target creature to its owner's hand.

card.name: Spined Megalodon
card.text: Hexproof Whenever this creature attacks, scry 1.

card.name: Scourge of the Floodrange
card.text: This creature can't attack unless a player has eight or more cards in their graveyard. Cache {2} ({2}, Exile this card from your hand: Draw a card. You can cast this later by also discarding a card.)

card.name: Thought Collapse
card.text: Counter target spell. Its controller mills three cards.

card.name: Famine's Gaze
card.text: Counter target spell unless its controller pays {X}. If that spell is countered this way, exile it instead of putting it into its owner's graveyard.

card.name: Iced In
card.text: Tap target creature and put a stun counter on it. (If a permanent with a stun counter would become untapped, remove one from it instead.) Flashback {2}{U} (You may cast this card from your graveyard for its flashback cost. Then exile it.)

card.name: Hoard Knowledge
card.text: Draw a card. Create a Clue token. (It's an artifact with "{2}, Sacrifice this artifact: Draw a card.")

card.name: Memory Torrent
card.text: Target player draws three cards. Cache {U} ({U}, Exile this card from your hand: Draw a card. You can cast this later by also discarding a card.)

card.name: Vanish from Sight
card.text: Target nonland permanent's owner puts it on their choice of the top or bottom of their library. Surveil 1. (Look at the top card of your library. You may put it into your graveyard.)

card.name: Driftcloak
card.text: Enchant creature Enchanted creature gets +1/+1 and has flying. Cache {2} ({2}, Exile this card from your hand: Draw a card. You can cast this later by also discarding a card.)

card.name: Rookie Mistake
card.text: Until end of turn, target creature gets +0/+2 and another target creature gets -2/-0.

card.name: Consuming Flood
card.text: Target player mills three cards. Then that player mills an additional two cards for each Calamity card in your graveyard.

card.name: Preying Mantis
card.text: Whenever you expend 5, this creature gets +3/+2 and gains trample until end of turn. (You expend 5 as you spend your fifth total mana to cast spells during a turn.)

card.name: Ruin Rummagers
card.text: Vigilance When this creature enters, draw a card if a creature you control dealt combat damage to a player or planeswalker this turn.

card.name: Spikemaw Mercenary
card.text: Deathtouch {G}, Exile this card from your graveyard: Target creature gains deathtouch until end of turn. Activate only as a sorcery.

card.name: Gardener of Abandon
card.text: {T}: Add one mana of any color. Each player mills a card. {5}{G}, {T}, Sacrifice this creature: Return target permanent card from your graveyard to your hand.

card.name: Flora Fender
card.text: Reach When this creature enters, exile up to one target card from a graveyard. Whenever one or more cards leave your graveyard, put a +1/+1 counter on this creature.

card.name: Harried Hunter
card.text: This creature can't be blocked by creatures with power 2 or less. Whenever one or more creatures you control deal combat damage to a player or planeswalker, put a +1/+1 counter on this creature.

card.name: Titanic Emergence
card.text: Create a 3/3 green Beast creature token. Put a +1/+1 counter on it for each Calamity card in your graveyard.

card.name: Snarlskin Packleader
card.text: Whenever you expend 5, look at the top four cards of your library. You may reveal a creature card from among them and put it into your hand. Put the rest on the bottom of your library in a random order. (You expend 5 as you spend your fifth total mana to cast spells during a turn.)

card.name: Campsite Ambush
card.text: Mill two cards. When you do, choose target creature you control and target creature you don't control. The creature you control gets +1/+1 for each nonland card milled this way. Then it fights target creature you don't control.

card.name: Might Upon Might
card.text: Put a +1/+1 counter on each of up to two target creatures. Flashback {2}{G} (You may cast this card from your graveyard for its flashback cost. Then exile it.)

card.name: Pathogenic Mists
card.text: Prevent all combat damage that would be dealt this turn. Each player mills three cards. (They put the top three cards of their library into their graveyard.)

card.name: Scavenger's Trek
card.text: Each player mills four cards, then you may choose a creature and/or a land card in a graveyard. Return each card chosen this way to its owner's hand. Cache {G} ({G}, Exile this card from your hand: Draw a card. You can cast this later by also discarding a card.)

card.name: Surge of Wildwood
card.text: Enchant creature Enchanted creature gets +1/+1 and has trample. You may cast this card from your graveyard by paying {3}{G}{G} rather than its mana cost.

card.name: Gratuitous Grasp
card.text: Choose one— • Gratuitous Grasp deals three times X damage to target creature with flying. • Target creature you control gets +0/+X and gains reach and hexproof until end of turn.

card.name: Retrogenic Cultivation
card.text: You may put a land card from your hand or graveyard onto the battlefield Draw a card.

card.name: Pestilence's Keep
card.text: Choose two— • Destroy target artifact or enchantment. • Shuffle up to five cards from your graveyard into your library. • Draw a card.

card.name: Animated Farmhand
card.text: Reach {1}: Add one mana of any color. Activate only once each turn.

card.name: Crumbling Kite
card.text: Flying Whenever this creature deals combat damage to a player, each player mills that many cards.

card.name: Ruined Golem
card.text: Trample {2}, Discard this card: Surveil 3. (Look at the top three cards of your library, then put any number of them into your graveyard and the rest on top of your library in any order.)

card.name: Trusty Axe
card.text: When this Equipment enters, attach it to target creature you control. Equipped creature gets +2/+2. Equip {4} Cache {2} ({2}, Exile this card from your hand: Draw a card. You can cast this later by also discarding a card.)

card.name: Meteorite
card.text: When this artifact enters, it deals 2 damage to any target. {T}: Add one mana of any color.

card.name: Honored Heirloom
card.text: {T}: Add one mana of any color. {2}, {T}: Exile target card from a graveyard.

card.name: Scavenger's Charm
card.text: Choose one— • Target creature gets +1/+1 and gains lifelink until end of turn. • Create a 1/1 white Ally creature token. • Return target creature card from your graveyard to your hand.

card.name: Willowroot Ritualist
card.text: Stalwart — Whenever you cast a spell that targets one or more Allies you control, you draw a card and you lose 1 life.

card.name: Bearer of Agony
card.text: Lifelink At the beginning of your end step, if you lost life this turn, draw a card. (Damage causes loss of life.)

card.name: Hallowed Soulsealer
card.text: Flying When this creature enters, exile any number of cards from target player's graveyard. Cache {2} ({2}, Exile this card from your hand: Draw a card. You can cast this later by also discarding a card.)

card.name: Grim Diabloist
card.text: Stalwart — Whenever you cast a spell that targets one or more Allies you control, target opponent loses life equal to the number of Allies you control.

card.name: Corrupted Savior
card.text: Flying Whenever you draw your second card each turn, put a +1/+1 counter on this creature. When this creature dies, return another target creature card with mana value less than or equal to this creature's power from your graveyard to the battlefield.

card.name: Starvation's Embrace
card.text: As an additional cost to cast this spell, pay {1} or 2 life. Destroy target creature or planeswalker.

card.name: With a Vengeance
card.text: This spell costs {1} less to cast if it targets a card in your graveyard that was put there from anywhere this turn. Return target creature card from your graveyard to the battlefield with an additional +1/+1 counter on it.

card.name: Piercing of the Day
card.text: Whenever one or more nontoken cards are put into your graveyard from your hand, your library, or the battlefield, you gain 2 life. Whenever one or more cards leave your graveyard, each opponent loses 2 life.

card.name: Violent Mutation
card.text: Target creature you control gets +X/+X until end of turn, where X is 1 plus the number of Calamity cards in your graveyard. It fights up to one target creature you don't control. (Each deals damage equal to its power to the other.)

card.name: Sifter Wurm
card.text: Trample When this creature enters, scry 3, then reveal the top card of your library. You gain life equal to that card's mana value.

card.name: Advocate Invoker
card.text: This creature enters with two +1/+1 counters on it. Stalwart — Whenever you cast a spell that targets one or more Allies you control, double the number of +1/+1 counters on this creature.

card.name: Budding Remnant
card.text: When this artifact enters, mill three cards. Whenever one or more cards leave your graveyard, put growth counter on this artifact. {T}: Add {G} for each growth counter on this artifact.

card.name: Answer // Nobody
card.text:
Surveil 2, then draw a card.
---
Aftermath (Cast this spell only from your graveyard. Then exile it.) Exile target card from a graveyard. Create an X/X colorless Horror creature token, where X is the exiled card's mana value.

card.name: Built // Scale
card.text:
Until end of turn, if one or more +1/+1 counters would be put on a creature you control, that many plus one +1/+1 counters are put on it instead.
---
Aftermath (Cast this spell only from your graveyard. Then exile it.) Distribute four +1/+1 counters among up to two target creatures.

card.name: Tormenting Nightmares
card.text: Exile the top X cards of target player's library, where X is 1 plus the number of Calamity cards in your graveyard. Choose one of them. For as long as that card remains exiled, you may play it, and you may spend mana as though it were mana of any color to cast that spell.

card.name: Break the Mold
card.text: Combat damage that would be dealt by creatures you control can't be prevented. Whenever a creature you control deals combat damage to a player or planeswalker, you may put a +1/+1 counter on it.

card.name: Conduit of Calamity
card.text: When this creature enters, you may search your library for a card with mana value 5 or greater, reveal it, then shuffle and put that card on top.

card.name: Replica Effigy
card.text: Whenever you cast an instant or sorcery spell that targets only this creature, you may pay {2}. If you do, copy that spell. You may choose new targets for the copy.

card.name: Boneborne Amalgam
card.text: This creature enters with an additional flying counter on it if X is 1 or more, an additional +1/+1 counter on it if X is 2 or more, an additional vigilance counter on it if X is 3 or more, an additional first strike counter on it if X is 4 or more, and and additional lifelink counter on it if X is 5 or more.

card.name: Soul-Guide Lantern
card.text: When this artifact enters, exile target card from a graveyard. {T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Exile each opponent's graveyard. {1}, {T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Draw a card.

card.name: Engulfed Relic
card.text: {T}: Add {C}{C}. {X}, {T}, Exile this artifact, Exile X cards from your graveyard: Create an X/X colorless Horror creature token.

card.name: Lafre, Head of Outreach
card.text: Spells you cast that target Allies you control cost {W}{U}{B}{R}{G} less to cast. This effect reduces only the amount of colored mana you pay. Stalwart — Whenever you cast a spell that targets one or more Allies you control, untap those creatures. If it's your combat phase, there's an additional combat phase after this one.

card.name: Greater Wildhorn
card.text: Double strike Whenever this creature deals combat damage to a player, return target creature card with mana value 3 or less from your graveyard to the battlefield.

card.name: Feyrouse, Beacon of Defiance
card.text: Whenever an opponent casts their first noncreature spell during each of their turns, draw a card unless that player pays {X}, where X is Feyrouse, Beacon of Defiance's power. Whenever you expend 5, put a +1/+1 counter on Feyrouse. (You expend 5 as you spend your fifth total mana to cast spells during a turn.) Whenever you expend 8, create a True Conviction token. (It's a {3}{W}{W}{W} enchantment with "Creatures you control have double strike and lifelink.")

card.name: Outreach Routeleader
card.text: Vigilance Whenever this creature attacks, if another Ally is attacking, you draw a card and you gain 1 life.

card.name: Immutable Crux
card.text: Choose one— • Destroy all Ally creatures. • Destroy all non-Ally creatures.

card.name: Path of Conquest
card.text: When this enchantment enters, create a 1/1 white Cleric creature token with lifelink and a Food token. (It's an artifact with "{2}, {T}, Sacrifice this token: You gain 3 life.") Creature tokens you control get +1/+1 for each noncreature token you control.

card.name: The Final Conquest
card.text: {2}{W}{W}, Pay 1 life: Create a 1/1 white Cleric creature token with lifelink. At the beginning of your upkeep, if you have exactly 10 life, have exactly seven cards in hand, and control exactly one creature, you win the game.

card.name: Owlwatch Warden
card.text: When this creature enters, create two 2/2 blue Bird Ally creature tokens with flying. Stalwart — Whenever you cast a spell that targets one or more Allies you control, scry 1, then draw a card.

card.name: Now and Never
card.text: Whenever you draw your second card during each of your turns, put two time counters on this enchantment. Once each turn, you may pay {0} rather than pay the mana cost for a spell you cast with mana value X or less, where X is the number of time counters on this enchantment.

card.name: Pelix, Starlight Oracle
card.text: Flying Whenever you expend 5, scry 5. (You expend 5 as you spend your fifth total mana to cast spells during a turn.) Whenever you expend 8, reveal cards from the top of your library until the total mana value of cards revealed this way is 8 or greater. Put those cards into your hand.

card.name: Patient Rebuilding
card.text: At the beginning of your upkeep, target opponent mills three cards, then you draw a card for each land card put into their graveyard this way.

card.name: The Ceaseless Famine
card.text: At the beginning of your draw step, if the number of cards in your library is less than half your starting deck size, draw an additional card. At the beginning of your upkeep, if the number of cards in your library is less than a quarter of your starting deck size, return target noncreature, nonland card from your graveyard to your hand. At the beginning of your upkeep, if your library has no cards in it, you win the game.

card.name: Cyclonic Tempest
card.text: Return up to X target nonland permanents to their owners' hands, where X is one plus the number of Calamity cards in your graveyard.

card.name: Rin Midor, Miasma Expert
card.text: Stalwart — Whenever you cast a spell that targets one or more Allies you control, non-Ally creatures get -1/-1 until end of turn.

card.name: Demon of Deepest Regrets
card.text: This spell costs {X} more to cast, where X is your life total. Flying When this creature enters, if you cast it, target player's life total becomes 13. Cache {2} ({2}, Exile this card from your hand: Draw a card. You can cast this later by also discarding a card.)

card.name: Soemo, the Moon Prophet
card.text: Menace Whenever you expend 5, target player reveals cards from the top of their library until they reveal a land card, then puts those cards into their graveyard. (You expend 5 as you spend your fifth total mana to cast spells during a turn.) Whenever you expend 8, put target creature card from a graveyard onto the battlefield under your control.

card.name: Forerunner of Death
card.text: This creature's power and toughness are each equal to the number of creature cards in all graveyards. Whenever a nontoken creature an opponent controls dies, you may draw a card. Whenever another nontoken creature you control dies, discard a card.

card.name: Delve the Unraveled
card.text: Return to your hand all permanent cards in your graveyard that were put there from anywhere this turn. Exile Delve the Unraveled.

card.name: Seek Salvation
card.text: This spell costs {1}{B} less to cast if your life total is less than or equal to half your starting life total. Search your library for a card, put it into your hand, then shuffle.

card.name: The March of Death
card.text: The March of Death deals 1 damage to any target. You gain 1 life. Then if you've cast thirteen or more spells named The March of Death this game, a player of your choice loses the game. Flashback {1}{B} (You may cast this card from your graveyard for its flashback cost. Then exile it.) {1}{B}: Put this card from exile into your hand.

card.name: Jelzidry, Chaos Conductor
card.text: Stalwart — Whenever you cast a spell that targets one or more Allies you control, if that spell is targeting only a single Ally you control, copy it for each other Ally creature you control. Each copy targets a different one of those creatures. Otherwise, copy that spell once and you may choose new targets for the copy. If a spell copied this way is a permanent spell, the copies gain "At the beginning of your end step, sacrifice this permanent."

card.name: Ruinous Confidant
card.text: At the beginning of your upkeep, exile the top card of your library. This creature deals damage to you equal to its mana value. You may play it this turn.

card.name: Zaika, Student of Delia
card.text: Whenever you expend 3, you may have Zaika, Student of Delia become a Goblin Ally Soldier with base power and toughness 2/2 and menace. (You expend 3 as you spend your third total mana to cast spells during a turn.) Whenever you expend 5, you may have Zaika become a Goblin Ally Soldier Shaman with base power and toughness 4/4, trample, and menace. Whenever you expend 8, Zaika becomes a Goblin Ally Soldier Shaman Advisor with base power and toughness 6/6, double strike, trample, and menace.

card.name: Guttering Flame
card.text: Flying, haste Whenever you expend 5, return this card from your graveyard to your hand. (You expend 5 as you spend your fifth total mana to cast spells during a turn.)

card.name: Xanpef, Paradox Fragment
card.text: Haste Whenever you cast a spell from anywhere other than your hand, create a token that's a copy of Xanpef, Paradox Fragment, except it's not legendary. Exile that token at the beginning of the next end step.

card.name: The Path of War
card.text: Whenever you attack, add {R} for each attacking creature. Until end of turn, you don't lose this mana as steps and phases end. Whenever you expend 15, put a domination counter on this enchantment. At the beginning of your upkeep, if this enchantment has a domination counter on it, you win the game.

card.name: Star of Extinction
card.text: Destroy target land. Star of Extinction deals 20 damage to each creature and each planeswalker.

card.name: Force of Extinction
card.text: Whenever this creature enters or attacks, choose one that hasn't been chosen this turn— • Create a 4/4 green Wurm creature token. • Creatures you control gain trample and indestructible until end of turn. • Destroy target noncreature, nonland permanent. • This creature fights target creature you don't control.

card.name: Slymel, Primal Invoker
card.text: Whenever you expend 5, create a 1/1 green Insect creature token. (You expend 5 as you spend your fifth total mana to cast spells during a turn.) Whenever you expend 8, you may have the base power and toughness of other creatures you control become equal to Slymel, Primal Invoker's power and toughness until end of turn.

card.name: Degredation Sage
card.text: When this creature enters, choose one— • Destroy target artifact. • Exile target player's graveyard. Activated abilities of artifacts and cards in graveyards can't be activated.

card.name: Escape to the Woods
card.text: When this enchantment enters, mill four cards. Whenever one or more creatures attack you or a planeswalker you control, you may exile a basic land card from your graveyard. If you do, prevent all combat damage that would be dealt this turn. Otherwise, sacrifice this enchantment.

card.name: Cunning Reclamation
card.text: Put all basic land cards from target player's graveyard onto the battlefield tapped under your control.

card.name: The Grasp of Pestilence
card.text: At the beginning of each opponent's end step, if you didn't lose life this turn, that opponent gets a poison counter. (A player with ten or more poison counters loses the game.)

card.name: Unleashed Afterlife
card.text: Return each creature card with mana value X or less from your graveyard to the battlefield, where X is 1 plus the number of Calamity cards in your graveyard.

card.name: Rite of Replication
card.text: Kicker {5} (You may pay an additional {5} as you cast this spell.) Create a token that's a copy of target creature. If this spell was kicked, create five of those tokens instead.

card.name: Necrotic Betrayal
card.text: Destroy up to X target creatures and/or planeswalkers, where X is one plus the number of Calamity cards in your graveyard. Return each card put into a graveyard this way to the battlefield under your control.

card.name: Primal Outbreak
card.text: Look at the top X cards of your library, where X is three plus the number of Calamity cards in your graveyard. You may put any number of creature cards from among them onto the battlefield. Put the rest into your graveyard.

card.name: Quick // Judge
card.text:
The next creature spell you cast this turn can be cast as though it had flash. That creature enters with an additional +1/+1 counter on it.
---
Aftermath (Cast this spell only from your graveyard. Then exile it.) Your opponents can't cast spells this turn. Creatures can't attack this turn.

card.name: Lost // Time
card.text:
Target nonland permanent phases out. (Treat it and anything attached to it as though they don't exist until its controller's next turn.)
---
Aftermath (Cast this spell only from your graveyard. Then exile it.) Take an extra turn after this one.

card.name: Dress // Kill
card.text:
Put a +1/+1 counter on target creature. It gains indestructible until end of turn.
---
Aftermath (Cast this spell only from your graveyard. Then exile it.) Destroy target creature or planeswalker. You gain 3 life.

card.name: Moment // Remember
card.text:
Until end of turn, whenever you cast an instant or sorcery spell, Moment deals 2 damage to each opponent.
---
Aftermath (Cast this spell only from your graveyard. Then exile it.) Each instant and sorcery card in your graveyard gains flashback until end of turn. The flashback cost is equal to its mana cost.

card.name: Adapt // Environment
card.text:
Choose target creature. Put a +1/+1 counter on each creature you control with equal or lesser power.
---
Aftermath (Cast this spell only from your graveyard. Then exile it.) Draw a card for each creature you control with power greater than the greatest power among creatures you don't control.

card.name: Er-Corress, Oblivion Priest
card.text: Whenever one or more creatures become the target of a spell you control, put a +1/+1 counter on Er-Corress, Oblivion Priest. {WB}, Remove two +1/+1 counters from Er-Corress: Exile target creature card from a graveyard. Create a 2/2 colorless Horror creature token. {1}{W}{B}, Pay 3 life, Remove four +1/+1 counters from Er-Corress: Exile target nonland permanent.

card.name: Artos, Seeker of Salvation
card.text: [+1]: Surveil 3. [-2]: You may cast target instant, sorcery, or Aura card from your graveyard this turn if that spell targets a creature you control. If an instant or sorcery spell cast this way would be put into your graveyard, exile it instead. [-8]: Put all creature cards from all graveyards onto the battlefield under your control. Each of them is a 2/2 Zombie Ally in addition to its other types.

card.name: Angel of Sanctity
card.text: Flash Flying Prevent all damage. (From any source controlled by any player.)

card.name: Fractalmancer
card.text: Whenever this creature becomes the target of a spell or ability you don't control, copy it. You may choose new targets for the copy. Whenever you expend 5, expend 8, or expend 10, copy target spell you control. You may choose new targets for the copy. (You expend 5 as you spend your fifth total mana to cast spells during a turn. A copy of a permanent spell becomes a token.)

card.name: Terror of the Catacombs
card.text: Flying Ward—Pay 3 life. (Whenever this creature becomes the target of a spell or ability an opponent controls, counter it unless that player pays 3 life.) Whenever one or more creatures cards are put into your graveyard from anywhere other than the battlefield, target opponent loses life equal to the greatest mana value among them.

card.name: Delia Bladeheart
card.text: [+1]: Until end of turn, Delia Bladeheart becomes a 3/1 Goblin Ally creature with haste and indestructible that's still a planeswalker. Prevent all damage that would be dealt to her this turn. [0]: Create a 1/1 white Ally creature token. [-3]: You get an emblem with "Creatures you control get +1/+0."

card.name: Xul Xet, Gigantimancer
card.text: Xul Xet, Gigantimancer and other creatures you control can't be blocked by creatures with lesser power. {3}{G}: Double target creature's power until end of turn.

card.name: The Final Arrival
card.text: This spell costs {1} less to cast for each Calamity card in in your graveyard. If you cast this spell from your hand, create, Zec'Tala, a legendary 20/20 colorless Elder Horror creature token with flying and indestructible.

card.name: Beginning // End
card.text:
Search your library for any number of colored cards. Reveal them. If no two cards revealed this way share a color, put them into your hand. Then shuffle.
---
Aftermath (Cast this spell only from your graveyard. Then exile it.) Choose any number of target colored permanents. If no two permanents chosen this way share a color, destroy them.

card.name: Glorious End
card.text: End the turn. (Exile all spells and abilities from the stack, including this card. The player whose turn it is discards down to their maximum hand size. Damage wears off, and "this turn" and "until end of turn" effects end.) At the beginning of your next end step, you lose the game.

card.name: Gunijo, the Executioner
card.text: Gunijo, the Executioner enters tapped. Whenever Gunijo attacks, destroy up to one target creature or planeswalker. You lose life equal to its mana value. As long as you have 5 or less life, you may cast Gunijo from your graveyard.

card.name: Force // Reckon
card.text:
Counter target spell. If that spell is countered this way, put it into its owner's hand instead of into that player's graveyard.
---
Aftermath (Cast this spell only from your graveyard. Then exile it.) Return target noncreature card from your graveyard to your hand.

card.name: Neglect // Mention
card.text:
Look at the top two cards of target player's library, then put them back in any order. Then you may have that player mill up to two cards.
---
Aftermath (Cast this spell only from your graveyard. Then exile it.) Exile target card from an opponent's graveyard. You may play that card for as long as it remains exiled, and mana of any type can be spent to cast that spell.

card.name: Doomed // Suffer
card.text:
Target creature gets +1/+0 until end of turn. When that creature dies this turn, create a 2/2 black Zombie creature token.
---
Aftermath (Cast this spell only from your graveyard. Then exile it.) Choose a nonland permanent type. Each player sacrifices a permanent of the chosen type. Each player who can't loses 2 life.

card.name: Fate // Bear
card.text:
Whenever a creature you control enters this turn, put a +1/+1 counter on it and it gains haste until end of turn.
---
Aftermath (Cast this spell only from your graveyard. Then exile it.) Create two 2/2 green Bear creature tokens.

card.name: Cling // Hope
card.text:
Target creature gains hexproof and indestructible until end of turn.
---
Aftermath (Cast this spell only from your graveyard. Then exile it.) Creatures you control get +2/+2 and gain vigilance and trample until end of turn.

card.name: Secrets // Unravel
card.text:
Search your library for a nonland permanent card with mana value 3 or less, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle.
---
Aftermath (Cast this spell only from your graveyard. Then exile it.) Exile target nonland permanent card from your graveyard. Create a token that's a copy of it.

card.name: Bone // Pick
card.text:
Mill three cards. Create a 1/1 black Skeleton creature token.
---
Aftermath (Cast this spell only from your graveyard. Then exile it.) Return target permanent card from your graveyard to your hand.

card.name: Live // Tell
card.text:
Return up to one permanent you control to its owner's hand.
---
Aftermath (Cast this spell only from your graveyard. Then exile it.) Draw a card, then you may put a permanent card with mana value 4 or less from your hand onto the battlefield.

card.name: Dare // Dream
card.text:
Target creature gets +1/+0 until end of turn. If it has base power 2 or less, it can't be blocked this turn.
---
Aftermath (Cast this spell only from your graveyard. Then exile it.) Exile the top three cards of your library. During any turn you attacked, you may play those cards.

card.name: Outreach Exemplar
card.text: Stalwart — Whenever you cast a spell that targets one or more Allies you control, creatures you control get +1/+0 until end of turn.

card.name: Grim Apostle
card.text: {1}{B}, Pay 2 life: Return this creature from your graveyard to the battlefield tapped.

card.name: Mistblade Opportunist
card.text: This creature has flying as long as you've drawn two or more cards this turn. {1}{B}: This creature gets +1/+1 until end of turn.

card.name: Grim Loyalist
card.text: This creature enters tapped. When it does, you mill two cards.

card.name: Swarmlord Locust
card.text: When this creature enters, exile up to one target card from a graveyard. Whenever a card leaves your graveyard, you may pay {1}. If you do, create a 1/1 green Insect creature token. Do this only once each turn.

card.name: Defiant Warden
card.text: Menace Stalwart — Whenever you cast a spell that targets one or more Allies you control, each opponent loses 1 life and you gain 1 life.

card.name: Blood Rager
card.text: When this creature enters, you draw a card and you lose 1 life. Whenever you expend 5, this creature gets +2/+2 and gains menace until end of turn. (You expend 5 as you spend your fifth total mana to cast spells during a turn.)

card.name: Doomed Rider
card.text: {1}{B}, Exile this card from your graveyard: Create a tapped 2/2 black Zombie creature token.

card.name: Unwavering Slayer
card.text: Stalwart — Whenever you cast a spell that targets one or more Allies you control, target creature you control gets +1/+1 and gains menace until end of turn.

card.name: Insurgent Bloodlord
card.text: Flying Whenever you lose life during your turn, this creature gains lifelink until end of turn. (Damage causes loss of life.)

card.name: Hooded Reaper
card.text: This spell costs {1} less to cast for each other card you own in exile. Cache {2} ({2}, Exile this card from your hand: Draw a card. You can cast this later by also discarding a card.)

card.name: Death's Embrace
card.text: Destroy target creature or planeswalker. Any number of target players each mill two cards.

card.name: Bloodstorm
card.text: Target creature gets -2/-2 until end of turn. It gets an additional -1/-1 until end of turn for each Calamity card in your graveyard.

card.name: Beg for Mercy
card.text: Each opponent loses 3 life unless that player sacrifices a nonland permanent. Flashback {3}{B} (You may cast this card from your graveyard for its flashback cost. Then exile it.)

card.name: Dreadful Disintigration
card.text: Each player loses 2 life. Then, destroy up to one target creature if it has mana value less than or equal to the greatest amount of life a player has lost this turn. (Damage causes loss of life.) Cache {2} ({2}, Exile this card from your hand: Draw a card. You can cast this later by also discarding a card.)

card.name: Midnight Negotiations
card.text: Each player loses 2 life. You draw two cards.

card.name: Soul's Guidance
card.text: Put a +1/+1 counter on target creature you control, then return a creature card with mana value less than or equal to that creature's power from your graveyard to the battlefield. Cache {1}{B} ({1}{B}, Exile this card from your hand: Draw a card. You can cast this later by also discarding a card.)

card.name: Hopes Become Ashes
card.text: Choose one — • Target opponent reveals their hand. You choose a noncreature, nonland card from it. That player exiles that card. • Put a face-up exiled card target opponent owns into their graveyard.

card.name: Confront Death
card.text: Until end of turn, target creature gains deathtouch and "When this creature dies, return it to the battlefield tapped under its owner's control."

card.name: Monstrous Shadow
card.text: As an additional cost to cast this spell, pay {2} or discard a card. Enchant creature Enchanted creature gets +3/+3 and has menace.

card.name: Tendril of Ruination
card.text: When this creature enters, mill three cards, then put a +1/+1 counter on this creature for each creature card in your graveyard. (To mill three cards, put the top three cards of your library into your graveyard.)

card.name: Ravenous Kurgecroc
card.text: Trample At the beginning of combat on your turn, if one or more cards have left your graveyard this turn, target creature gets +2/+2 until end of turn.

card.name: Renovator Colossus
card.text: When this creature enters, put up to one target permanent card from your graveyard on top of your library. Cache {2} ({2}, Exile this card from your hand: Draw a card. You can cast this later by also discarding a card.)

card.name: Gleeful Sadist
card.text: Haste This creature gets +1/+1 as long as you've lost life this turn. (Damage causes loss of life.)

card.name: Magma Slinger
card.text: Stalwart — Whenever you cast a spell that targets one or more Allies you control, this creature deals 1 damage to target player or planeswalker.

card.name: Scion of Brimstone
card.text: When this creature enters, it deals 1 damage to any target and 1 damage to you.

card.name: Disaster Channeler
card.text: Reach Whenever you expend 5, you may discard a card. If you do, draw a card. (You expend 5 as you spend your fifth total mana to cast spells during a turn.)

card.name: Living Campfire
card.text: Whenever you cast a spell from anywhere other than your hand, target creature gets +1/+0 and gains menace until end of turn. Cache {2} ({2}, Exile this card from your hand: Draw a card. You can cast this later by also discarding a card.)

card.name: Wildpaw Domesitcator
card.text: Stalwart — Whenever you cast a spell that targets one or more Allies you control, create a 1/1 red Cat creature token. This ability triggers only once each turn.

card.name: Reckless Hammerskull
card.text: Whenever this creature attacks or blocks, it deals 1 damage to you.

card.name: Disastimancer
card.text: When this creature enters, exile target instant or sorcery card from your graveyard. Until the end of your next turn, you may cast that card. If a Calamity card is exiled this way, this creature gains haste until end of turn.

card.name: Fragmented Warlord
card.text: Trample Whenever you expend 5, this creature gets +2/+1 until end of turn. (You expend 5 as you spend your fifth total mana to cast spells during a turn.)

card.name: Gored Cyclops
card.text: Menace As long as you've lost life this turn, this creature gets +1/+1 and has haste. (Damage causes loss of life.) Cache {2} ({2}, Exile this card from your hand: Draw a card. You can cast this later by also discarding a card.)

card.name: Ionic Outburst
card.text: Ionic Outburst deals X damage to target creature or planeswalker, where X is 2 plus the number of Calamities in your graveyard.

card.name: Seismic Outburst
card.text: Seismic Outburst deals 5 damage to target creature or planeswalker. Excess damage is dealt to that permanent's controller instead.

card.name: Dismantling Pulse
card.text: Destroy target artifact. Dismantling Pulse deals 1 damage to that artifact's controller.

card.name: Inspiration of Example
card.text: Target creature you control gets +2/+2 until end of turn. Other creatures you control get +1/+0 until end of turn.

card.name: Sorrow's Release
card.text: Add {R}{R}{R}. Sorrow's Release deals 1 damage to you.

card.name: Ashen Instincts
card.text: Enchant creature Enchanted creature gets +2/+2 and has haste. Cache {R} ({R}, Exile this card from your hand: Draw a card. You can cast this later by also discarding a card.)

card.name: Spark of War
card.text: Target creature gets +1/+0 and gains first strike until end of turn. Exile the top card of your library. Until the end of your next turn, you may play that card.

card.name: Violent War Cry
card.text: Choose one— • Target creature can't block this turn. • Target creature gets +3/+0 until end of turn. Flashback {2}{R} (You may cast this card from your graveyard for its flashback cost. Then exile it.)

card.name: Liberating Blow
card.text: Target creature you control deals damage equal to its power to another target creature. Scry 1.

card.name: Maddening Haze
card.text: Untap up to X target creatures and gain control of them until end of turn, where X is one plus the number of Calamities in your graveyard. They gain haste until end of turn.

card.name: Colossal Ally
card.text: Stalwart — Whenever you cast a spell that targets one or more Allies you control, target creature has base power and toughness 6/6 and gains trample until end of turn.

card.name: Eh'Tharaesed, Who Saw All
card.text: If drawing a card except the first one you draw in each of your draw steps causes an ability of a permanent you control to trigger, that ability triggers an additional time.

card.name: Decoator Crab
card.text: Tap two untapped tokens you control: This creature can't be blocked this turn. Whenever this creature deals combat damage to a player, create a 0/1 blue Plant Wall creature token with defender named Kelp.

card.name: Ancestral Animus
card.text: Flying Whenever you draw your second card each turn, create a 1/1 blue Spirit creature token with flying.

card.name: Guiding Voices
card.text: Whenever this creature deals combat damage to a player, target player mills that many cards. Whenever you expend 5, this creature gets +2/+2 until end of turn and can't be blocked this turn. (You expend 5 as you spend your fifth total mana to cast spells during a turn.)

card.name: Portalmaster Vanguard
card.text: Whenever you cast Portalmaster Vanguard or another spell, if it wasn't cast from your hand, draw a card. This ability triggers only once each turn. Cache {2} ({2}, Exile this card from your hand: Draw a card. You can cast this later by also discarding a card.)

card.name: Scholar of the Lost Troves
card.text: Flying When this creature enters, if you cast it, search your library for an instant or sorcery card, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle. Cache {1}{U} ({1}{U}, Exile this card from your hand: Draw a card. You can cast this later by also discarding a card.)

card.name: Wailing Husk
card.text: Vigilance When this creature enters, choose up to one target creature with mana value X or less. Its owner puts it on the top or bottom of their library. {1}{U}, {T}: Target player mills three cards.

card.name: Unbearable Secrets
card.text: When this enchantment enters, draw a card, then discard a card. Whenever you draw a card, target opponent mills two cards.

card.name: Swelling Surge
card.text: Counter target spell. Whenever you expend 5, you may exile this card from your graveyard. If you do, draw a card. (You expend 5 as you spend your fifth total mana to cast spells during a turn.)

card.name: Recategorize
card.text: Target player shuffles their graveyard into their library. Exile Recategorize. (It won't be cached when exiled this way.) Cache {U} ({U}, Exile this card from your hand: Draw a card. You can cast this later by also discarding a card.)

card.name: Flash Frost
card.text: Tap up to X target creatures and put a stun counter on each of them, where X is one plus the number of Calamities in your graveyard. (If a permanent with a stun counter would become untapped, remove one from it instead.)

card.name: True // Form
card.text:
Create a 1/1 white Ally creature token. Draw a card.
---
Aftermath (Cast this spell only from your graveyard. Then exile it.) Up to two target creatures each lose all abilities and become your choice of a 1/1 blue Fish or a 4/4 blue Octopus until end of turn.

card.name: Epoch Sculpting
card.text: When this enchantment enters, draw a card. {1}{U}, Sacrifice this enchantment: Draw a card. {1}{U}, Exile this card from your graveyard: Draw a card. Cache {U} ({U}, Exile this card from your hand: Draw a card. You can cast this later by also discarding a card.)

card.name: Forlorn Priest
card.text: Lifelink Stalwart — Whenever you cast a spell that targets one or more Allies you control, scry 2.

card.name: Craftrig Rescuer
card.text: Whenever this creature deals combat damage to a player, create a tapped 1/1 white Ally creature token. {2}: This creature gains flying until end of turn.

card.name: Heightseeker Wildhorn
card.text: As long as this creature is attacking, it gets +1/+0 and has first strike. Whenever this creature deals combat damage to a player, exile target permanent, then return that permanent to the battlefield under its owner's control.

card.name: Nameless Martyr
card.text: When this creature dies, put a +1/+1 counter on each creature you control.

card.name: Survivor's Stampede
card.text: Target creature you control gets +3/+0 until end of turn. Each other creature you control gets +2/+1 until end of turn. Cache {2}{W} ({2}{W}, Exile this card from your hand: Draw a card. You can cast this later by also discarding a card.) When you cache this card, create two tapped 1/1 white Ally creature tokens.

card.name: Purveyor of the Wastes
card.text: Flying Whenever one or more tokens you control leave the battlefield, reveal the top card of your library. If it's a permanent card, put it into your hand. Otherwise, you may put it into your graveyard. This ability triggers only once each turn.

card.name: Militant Showman
card.text: Stalwart — Whenever you cast a spell that targets one or more Allies you control, if it's your turn, this creature gains double strike until end of turn. Otherwise, untap it.

card.name: Voidgaze
card.text: Choose one— • Counter target spell with mana value 4 or greater. • Counter target spell that was cast from anywhere other than its owner's hand.

card.name: Fates Willing
card.text: Target creature you control gains protection from the color of your choice until end of turn. (It can't be blocked, targeted, dealt damage, enchanted, or equipped by anything of that color until end of turn.) Surveil 1. (Look at the top card of your library. You may put it into your graveyard.)

card.name: Next // Nothing
card.text:
Tap target creature, then untap another target creature.
---
Aftermath (Cast this spell only from your graveyard. Then exile it.) Exile target tapped creature and target untapped creature.

card.name: Conquest, the First Horseman
card.text: Lifelink Whenever Conquest, the First Horseman attacks, return target creature card from your graveyard to the battlefield tapped and attacking. Whenever Conquest blocks, return target creature card from your graveyard to the battlefield blocking each creature Conquest is blocking.

card.name: Famine, the Third Horseman
card.text: Prowess (Whenever you cast a noncreature spell, this creature gets +1/+1 until end of turn.) Whenever Famine, the Third Horseman attacks, put a stun counter on each creature defending player controls. Whenever Famine blocks, put a stun counter on each attacking creature.

card.name: Death, the Final Horseman
card.text: Deathtouch Whenever Death, the Final Horseman attacks, destroy target creature defending player controls. Whenever Death blocks, attacking player sacrifices an attacking creature.

card.name: War, the Second Horseman
card.text: Haste Whenever War, the Second Horseman attacks for the first time each turn, untap it and up to one other target creature. After this phase, there is an additional combat phase. Whenever War blocks, it and another target blocking creature gain double strike until end of turn.

card.name: Pestilence, the Fourth Horseman
card.text: Wither (This deals damage to creatures in the form of -1/-1 counters.) Whenever Pestilence, the Fourth Horseman attacks, double the number of counters on any number of target creatures. Whenever Pestilence blocks, put a +1/+1 counter on each blocking creature.

card.name: Betrayer of Light
card.text: Flying, trample, lifelink As this enters, you may sacrifice any number of creatures. This creature enters with that many +1/+1 counters on it.

card.name: Fevered Visions
card.text: At the beginning of each player's end step, that player draws a card. If the player is your opponent and has four or more cards in hand, this enchantment deals 2 damage to that player.

card.name: Phopus, Mist Sage
card.text: Flash When Phopus, Mist Sage enters, prevent all damage that would be dealt to it this turn. Whenever damage that would be dealt to you or a creature you control is prevented, target player mills that many cards.

card.name: Nick of Time
card.text: Choose one— • Until end of turn, your life total can't change and you gain protection from everything. • All permanents you control phase out. (Treat them and anything attached to them as though they don't exist until your next turn.) Exile Nick of Time.

card.name: Caljak, Shadow of the End
card.text: Whenever Caljak, Shadow of the End attacks, put a face-up exiled card into its owner's graveyard. If that card is an artifact card, Caljak gains indestructible until end of turn. If that card is a creature card, put a +1/+1 counter on Caljak. If that card is an enchantment card, Caljak gains deathtouch until end of turn. If that card is a land card, you gain 3 life. If that card is none of those types, draw a card.

card.name: Noctus, Shaper of Stars
card.text: [+1]: Look at the top three cards of your library. Put one of those cards into your hand, one on top of your library, and one on the bottom of your library. [0]: Exile target nonland permanent. Return it to the battlefield under its owner's control at the beginning of your next upkeep. [-4]: Until your next turn, each player skips their beginning phase. (The beginning phase includes the untap, upkeep, and draw steps.)

card.name: Opportunistic Ooze
card.text: Whenever this creature enters or attacks, exile up to one target card from a graveyard. If it was a creature or Calamity card, put a +1/+1 counter on this creature.

card.name: Spore Bear
card.text: {T}, Sacrifice this creature: Prevent all combat damage that would be dealt this turn.

card.name: Obliteration Troll
card.text: Trample At the beginning of each players upkeep, that player mills a card. This creature can't attack or block unless a creature card was put into a graveyard from anywhere this turn.

card.name: Witness of the End
card.text: At the beginning of your end step, if you expended 5 this turn, return target permanent card from your graveyard to your hand. (You expend 5 as you spend your fifth total mana to cast spells during a turn.)

card.name: Survivor's Tenacity
card.text: Enchant creature Enchanted creature gets +2/+0 and has trample. As long as you have expended 5 this turn, you may cast this card from your graveyard without paying its mana cost. (You expend 5 as you spend your fifth total mana to cast spells during a turn.)

card.name: Hound of War
card.text: Haste This creature enters with an additional +1/+1 counter on it if it was cast from anywhere other than your hand. Cache {2} ({2}, Exile this card from your hand: Draw a card. You can cast this later by also discarding a card.)

card.name: Otherworldly Occultist
card.text: Whenever you cast a spell from anywhere other than your hand, create a 1/1 white Ally creature token. It gains haste until end of turn.

card.name: Alliance Firestarter
card.text: Damage can't be prevented. Stalwart — Whenever you cast a spell that targets one or more Allies you control, this creature deals 1 damage to any target.

card.name: Burning Champion
card.text: At the beginning of your end step, if you lost life this turn, put a +1/+1 counter on this creature. (Damage causes loss of life.) When this creature dies, it deals damage equal to its power to any target.

card.name: Alliance Officer
card.text: First strike At the beginning of each combat, if you expended 5 this turn, creatures you control get +1/+0 and gain haste until end of turn. (You expend 5 as you spend your fifth total mana to cast spells during a turn.)

card.name: Frightful Compatriot
card.text: Menace Stalwart — Whenever you cast a spell that targets one or more Allies you control, target creature can't block this turn.

card.name: Uncontrollable Forces
card.text: Uncontrollable Forces deals 5 damage to target creature or planeswalker. Excess damage is dealt to you instead.

card.name: Devastation of War
card.text: Devastation of War deals X damage to each creature, where X is 1 plus the number of Calamity cards in your graveyard.

card.name: Act on Instinct
card.text: Exile the top three cards of your library. Until the end of your next turn, you may play those cards. Cache {2} ({2}, Exile this card from your hand: Draw a card. You can cast this later by also discarding a card.)

card.name: Melting Point
card.text: Choose one — • Destroy target artifact. • Change the target of target spell or ability with a single target. • Melting Point deals 1 damage to each player.

card.name: Blast // Smithereens
card.text:
Target creature you control deals damage equal to its power to target creature or planeswalker you don't control.
---
Aftermath (Cast this spell only from your graveyard. Then exile it.) Exile target card from a graveyard. Create a number of tapped Treasure tokens equal to its mana value.

card.name: Defiant Strike
card.text: Target creature gets +1/+0 until end of turn. Draw a card.
